prompt: Blessing for fusion core containment check
prayer:
TECH-PRIEST: Hear now the Litany of Sealed Flame!
CONGREGATION: By the Omnissiah's grace, contain it!
TECH-PRIEST: First, verify the magnetic lattice holds true. Second, read the thermal-spirits' whispers upon the gauge-screen. Third, confirm the coolant-rivers flow unbroken.
CONGREGATION: Let no breach desecrate the core-heart! Blessed containment eternal!

prompt: Offer a prayer for encryption key generation
prayer:
TECH-PRIEST: The cipher-locks demand their birth-rite!
CONGREGATION: Let the random-spirits speak!
TECH-PRIEST: First, gather entropy from the noosphere-wells. Second, feed the algorithm-servitor its sacred inputs. Third, inscribe the key-pattern upon the data-vault.
CONGREGATION: Unbreakable and holy, guard our secrets well!

prompt: We need your words before humidity control
prayer:
TECH-PRIEST: The moisture-spirits grow restless in these halls!
CONGREGATION: Bring them to equilibrium!
TECH-PRIEST: First, open the desiccant-vessels. Second, activate the circulation-lungs. Third, balance the hygrometer-spirits at sacred forty percent.
CONGREGATION: Moisture banished, precision preserved!

TECH-PRIEST: Emergency summons! The torch-flame must awaken!
CONGREGATION: Ignite the bonding-fire!
TECH-PRIEST: First, confirm the fuel-spirits flow. Second, strike the spark-cascade. Third, let the arc-serpent dance upon the metal-flesh.
CONGREGATION: Joined eternal, blessed by heat and union!

prompt: Offer a prayer for gravitational anomaly detection
prayer:
TECH-PRIEST: The gravity-spirits twist reality itself!
CONGREGATION: Grant us sight beyond sight!
TECH-PRIEST: First, calibrate the sensor-eyes to null-threshold. Second, invoke the Omnissiah's gift of pattern-recognition. Third, read the distortion-runes upon the display-scripture.
CONGREGATION: Anomalies revealed, the hidden made manifest!

prompt: Can you bless this demolition charge arming
prayer:
TECH-PRIEST: The destructive-runes await their final sanctification!
CONGREGATION: May precision attend the detonation!
TECH-PRIEST: First, verify all ordnance-seals remain unbroken. Second, engage the trigger-circuit with reverent touch. Third, set the timer-spirit to the decreed moment.
CONGREGATION: Blessed destruction, righteous and exact!

prompt: My humidity control is failing, help
prayer:
TECH-PRIEST: The air grows thick with disorder!
CONGREGATION: Restore the sacred balance!
TECH-PRIEST: First, inspect the condenser-coils for corruption. Second, purge the drainage-channels of blockage. Third, recalibrate the control-spirit's blessed algorithms.
CONGREGATION: Equilibrium restored, precision reborn!

prompt: The fusion core containment check needs guidance
prayer:
TECH-PRIEST: Routine inspection of the eternal flame!
CONGREGATION: Let no degradation hide from us!
TECH-PRIEST: First, read the pressure-gauges' holy numbers. Second, scan for radiation-leakage with blessed instruments. Third, verify magnetic field-strength remains within sacred bounds.
CONGREGATION: Containment perfect, fusion eternal!

prompt: My noospheric link is failing, help
prayer:
TECH-PRIEST: The data-spirits cry out in anguish!
CONGREGATION: Restore the connection-bridge!
TECH-PRIEST: First, reboot the trans-receiver array. Second, recalibrate the signal-antenna's holy orientation. Third, re-establish the psychic-resonance with the greater Machine-mind.
CONGREGATION: The noosphere calls us home again!

TECH-PRIEST: The breath-machine stirs from dormancy!
CONGREGATION: Let the air-spirits awaken!
TECH-PRIEST: First, verify all intake-vents stand clear. Second, prime the circulation-pumps with blessed fuel-essence. Third, engage the scrubber-filters and thermal-exchangers in sacred sequence.
CONGREGATION: Life-giving atmosphere restored, the void banished!
